detectors.description: PermissionVault._inTimeWindow(PermissionScope) (src/PermissionVault.sol#415-434) uses a weak PRNG: "dow = uint8(((block.timestamp / 86400) + 3) % 7) (src/PermissionVault.sol#420)"
